info.name: Build With Me - Full API (Auth + Onboarding + Profile + Projects + Community)
info.description: Complete test suite for authentication, onboarding, profile (combined), projects (role-based CRUD, applications with role selection, team management), community (posts, comments, likes, saves, follows, mute, report, profile stats), and negative tests. Uses HTTP-only cookies – Postman manages them automatically.

variable.description: Copy from password reset OTP email (6 digits)
